name: Build your first AI agent
description: A beginner-friendly AI agent that demonstrates tool use: takes a question, searches the web for real-time information via Exa, uses Claude for reasoning and calculations, and posts a helpful answer to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for web search

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting results

question.description: The user's question — can involve facts, calculations, or current events

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the answer

steps.name: Classify the question type and extract search query
Search the web for relevant information via Exa
Build AI prompt for reasoning and answering
Run Claude AI for reasoning and answer
